scripts.build:shared: npm run build --workspace=mcp-utils && npm run build --workspace=mcp-logger && npm run build --workspace=sap-auth
scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build:servers
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd packages/servers/playwright-mcp && npm install
scripts.build:all: npm run build && npm run build:playwright
scripts.build:playwright: cd packages/servers/playwright-mcp && npm install && npm run build
